message:
fix: handle "nothing to commit" race in CommitPending

Dolt Status() can report changes (e.g., system tables) that Commit()
then considers empty. Treat "nothing to commit" from Commit() as a
no-op rather than propagating the error.

Fixes TestCommitPending/returns_false_when_nothing_to_commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
